# Yuni Rides - Student Transportation Services
# https://www.yunirides.com

Yuni Rides provides safe, technology-driven student transportation services
for school districts and families across the United States. We specialize in
special needs transportation, McKinney-Vento services, foster youth transport,
and general education student transport.

Key Pages:
- https://www.yunirides.com/ (Homepage)
- https://www.yunirides.com/about/ (about us)
- https://www.yunirides.com/become-a-driver/ (Driver Application)
- https://www.yunirides.com/services/
- https://www.yunirides.com/blog/ (Blog & Resources)
- https://www.yunirides.com/contact-us/ (Contact)
- https://www.yunirides.com/careers/ (careers)

''


'',

Driver Recruitment:
- Part-time weekday schedules (Monday-Friday, mornings & afternoons)
- $35/hour average pay
- $500 signup bonus after 50 rides
- Weekends off
- Requirements: Valid license, 3+ years driving history, background check
- We cover background check and 8-hour safety certification costs

Service Areas:
- Washington: Seattle, Everett, Tacoma, Lynwood, Renton, Edmonds, Tukwila,
  Shoreline, Kent, Redmond, Federal Way, Bellevue
- California, Arizona, Texas, Illinois

Contact: info@yunirides.com | (415) 535-2155
